items.title: Taiwan raids Super Micro offices in probe over Nvidia chip smuggling to China
items.summary: Taiwanese authorities have raided the offices of Super Micro Computer and several local partner companies. The article Taiwan raids Super Micro offices in probe over Nvidia chip smuggling to China appeared first on The Decoder.

items.title: Deepseek's DSpark boosts AI speed by up to 85 percent, a strategic win under tightening US export controls
items.summary: Deepseek's new DSpark framework boosts per-user response speed by 60 to 85 percent. A small model proposes token candidates that the larger model checks in batches, squeezing more performance out of fewer chips. That could further reduce China's dependence on US high-end hardware

items.title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
items.summary: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

items.title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
items.summary: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

items.title: Samsung and SK Hynix plan $590 billion chip investment as AI demand sends memory prices soaring

items.title: Amazon engineers are reportedly distilling Anthropic models to cut costs before new token-based pricing kicks in
items.summary: Amazon engineers are already distilling Anthropic models into smaller, cheaper versions for internal use. Starting next year, Amazon will pay by tokens processed rather than compute hours, which could push costs up sharply. The company is also exploring alternatives like OpenAI.

items.title: EU seeks AI independence as Austria proposes luring Anthropic to Europe

items.title: Meta restricts use of Claude Code and Codex to keep rival AI out of its training data

items.title: Deloitte tells its own consultants: AI is coming for the billable hour

items.title: EU Parliament approves Digital Omnibus, delaying AI Act rules
